Dashboard.title: SME Dashboard
Dashboard.connectWalletDesc: Connect Freighter to view and manage your invoices.

notifications.loadError: Failed to load invoices. Make sure contracts are deployed.

wallet.freighterMissing: Freighter not detected. Please install the browser extension and reload.
wallet.addressUnavailable: Could not retrieve wallet address. Please try again.
wallet.connectFailed: Failed to connect wallet after multiple attempts. Please try again.
wallet.disconnectedDescription: Your Freighter wallet is no longer connected to this site. Reconnect to continue.

Invest.title: Invest
Invest.description: Deposit accepted stablecoins into the Astera pool. Earn yield backed by real invoice repayments. Withdraw in the same token you deposited.
Invest.poolNotDeployed: Pool not deployed yet. Deploy contracts to see live data.
Invest.kycRequired: KYC verification required. Your address is not yet approved to deposit. Contact the pool administrator to complete verification.
Invest.kycVerified: KYC verified — you are approved to deposit.

notes.stablecoin: Choose a whitelisted stablecoin; deposits and withdrawals use that token.
notes.repayment: Invoice funding and repayment use the same token registered for that invoice.
notes.withdrawal: Only undeployed funds can be withdrawn at any time.
